executionHistory.summary: Scope 1 (Normalizer): initial normalizer, classifier, tier assignment, RateLimiter struct. First 15+ unit tests.
Stochastic quality sweeps: gaps-to-doc (G1-G11, 11 fixes), simplify-to-doc (S1-S2), regression-to-doc (zero findings), stabilize-to-doc (ST1-ST5, 5 fixes). Total 102 tests.

Stochastic quality sweeps: security-to-doc x3 passes (SEC-1 through SEC3-4, 15 issues fixed, 30 security tests added), harden-to-doc (H-1 through H-6, 13 hardening tests added), simplify-to-doc pass 2 (S3-S5).
Stochastic quality sweeps: stabilize-to-doc pass 2 (ST6-ST9), simplify-to-doc pass 3 (S6 awaitRateLimit extraction), chaos-hardening (C1-C4, 10 chaos tests added).

Implemented Scopes 2-6: (S2) Real REST client with doDiscordRequest, fetchChannelMessages pagination, fetchPinnedMessages, rate limit handling. (S3) Real token validation via GET /users/@me. (S4) Gateway EventPoller with per-channel polling, event buffering, reconnection with exponential backoff. (S5) Active+archived thread fetching, per-thread cursors, thread metadata on artifacts. (S6) Capture tier forced to full, capture metadata in artifacts. Regression sweep (REG-014-R22-001/002), improve pass (IMP-014-IE-001/002/003). 147 test functions, all pass with -race.

Trace-guard cleanup batch (post MIT-FRAMEWORK-001 patch): closed 15 trace failures (15->0). Added Test Plan tables to Scopes 01-06 referencing internal/connector/discord/discord_test.go and internal/connector/discord/gateway_test.go (already mentioned in report.md). Added 'Scenario "<scenario name>": ' DoD-trace prefixes to existing DoD bullets covering SCN-DC-NRM-001/002, SCN-DC-REST-001/002, SCN-DC-CONN-001, SCN-DC-GW-001, SCN-DC-THR-004, SCN-DC-CMD-003. No DoD content rewriting; no source/test/config/framework changes. artifact-lint clean; traceability-guard PASSED 0 failures.

Stochastic-quality-sweep round 24 (sweep-2026-05-23-r30) chaos-hardening: parent-expanded child workflow probe of internal/connector/discord/discord.go rate-limit header parsing surfaced 4 findings (F-CHAOS-R30-001..004) covering two adversarial axes — non-finite floats (NaN, ±Inf, Infinity in parseRetryAfter and updateRateLimits) and unbounded absurd finite floats (Retry-After: 86400 → 24h block; X-RateLimit-Reset: 99999999999999.0 → ~292,277 year ShouldWait; int64 overflow at 9223372036854775000 → silent rate-limit disabling). BUG-014-002-rate-limit-header-no-upper-bound packet (spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, state.json, uservalidation.md) authored; fix landed in discord.go (added maxRetryAfter and maxRateLimitResetFromNow constants = 5min each; hardened parseRetryAfter and updateRateLimits with math.IsNaN/math.IsInf rejection plus pre-conversion caps; ordering rationale captured in design.md). 6 adversarial regression tests (24 sub-cases) added to discord_test.go. Adversarial-fidelity proven by revert+restore cycle: 4 of 6 R30 tests FAIL with concrete diagnostics when guards reverted, all PASS when restored. Full package green with race detector: ok 10.221s. go vet + gofmt -l clean. Bug status: resolved.

Provenance entry restored by BUG-014-003 (sweep-2026-05-24-r10 round 5). Spec 014 select phase: 6-scope decomposition of Discord connector (Normalizer, REST Client, Connector+Config, Gateway, Threads, Bot Command Capture). See specs/014-discord-connector/spec.md and design.md. Original execution predated current strict-mode Gate G022 agent-provenance requirement.

Provenance entry restored by BUG-014-003. Spec 014 bootstrap phase: scope plans, DoD wording, dependency map (Scope 1 foundational; Scopes 2/3 depend on 1; Scope 4 depends on 3; Scope 5 depends on 4; Scope 6 depends on 4), test plan structure. See specs/014-discord-connector/scopes.md.

Provenance entry restored by BUG-014-003. Spec 014 implement phase: discord.go Normalizer/classifyMessage/assignTier/RateLimiter, gateway.go EventPoller, config/smackerel.yaml discord section with 9 SST empty-string placeholders. See report.md 'Implementation (2026-04-10)'.

Provenance entry restored by BUG-014-003. Spec 014 test phase: 150 test functions (141 discord_test.go + 9 gateway_test.go), all pass with -race. Scenario-first red->green tdd cadence documented in report.md '### TDD Evidence'. See report.md '### Test Evidence'.

Provenance entry restored by BUG-014-003. Spec 014 regression phases: 'Regression-To-Doc Sweep 2026-04-10' (zero findings, G1-G11 + S1-S2 durable) and 'Regression-To-Doc Sweep 2026-04-17' (REG-014-R22-001/002 fixes). All prior sweep fixes durable.

Provenance entry restored by BUG-014-003. Spec 014 simplify phases: 4 passes (2026-04-10 S1-S2 unified channel loop + dead control flow removal, 2026-04-18 S3-S5, 2026-04-22 pass 3, 2026-05-09 S6 awaitRateLimit extraction). All net behavior-preserving with full test pass.

Provenance entry restored by BUG-014-003. Spec 014 stabilize phases: 4 passes (2026-04-10 ST1-ST5, 2026-04-17 ST6-ST9, 2026-04-21 pass 3, 2026-05-19 ST-R94-001/002/003). Race detector clean across all stability tests.

Provenance entry restored by BUG-014-003. Spec 014 security phases: 3 passes (2026-04-15 SEC-1..SEC1-7, 2026-04-25 SEC-2-1..SEC-2-5, 2026-05-15 SEC3-1..SEC3-4). 15 issues fixed, 30 security tests added covering SSRF, snowflake validation, cursor scope, content sanitization, resource caps.

Provenance entry restored by BUG-014-003. Spec 014 validate phase: 'Validate-To-Doc Sweep 2026-04-15' certified all 6 scopes done. Re-run by BUG-014-003 in 2026-05-25 confirms guard-clean state-transition-guard verdict on parent spec post-restoration.
Provenance entry restored by BUG-014-003. Spec 014 audit phase: 'Audit Sweep 2026-04-17' verified test/code/doc consistency, artifact-lint clean, traceability-guard PASSED, certification status done.

Provenance entry restored by BUG-014-003. Spec 014 chaos phases: 'Chaos-Hardening Sweep 2026-04-21' (C1-C4 with 10 chaos tests) and 'Chaos-Hardening Sweep 2026-05-23' (BUG-014-002 R30 rate-limit chaos with 6 R30 tests + 4 hardened guards). All durable with race detector enabled.

Provenance entry restored by BUG-014-003. Spec 014 docs phases: per-sweep '#### Remediation Summary' sections in report.md for every gaps/simplify/stabilize/security/harden/chaos pass plus DevOps narrative plus connector-development doc updates. Most recent: BUG-014-002 R30 closure narrative.

Provenance entry restored by BUG-014-003. Spec 014 spec-review phase: 'Spec-Review Sweep' confirmed spec artifacts and certification are coherent. Closed legacy-improvement spec-review hook required for reconcile-to-doc workflow mode.

sweep-2026-05-24-r10 round 5 trigger=improve mappedMode=improve-existing parent-expanded child workflow probe: bubbles.analyst surfaced 40 state-transition-guard.sh BLOCK findings against legacy spec 014 grouped into 7 finding classes (F1 TDD evidence missing, F2 5 missing required phases, F3 8 phase impersonations, F4 18 regression E2E DoD/Test Plan items, F5 Code Diff Evidence missing, F6 19 G040 deferral hits, F7 1 DoD-Gherkin fidelity gap on SCN-DC-THR-001). Drift root cause: legacy spec certified 2026-04-17 predates current strict-mode Gates G022, G040, G053, G060, G068, Check 8A. Routed to BUG-014-003-governance-baseline-drift artifact-only validate-to-doc bug packet.

BUG-014-003 closure executed: 6-artifact bug packet authored at specs/014-discord-connector/bugs/BUG-014-003-governance-baseline-drift/. Parent scopes.md updated with 18 regression E2E DoD/Test Plan lines + 1 SCN-DC-THR-001 fidelity DoD bullet + 13 g040-skip sentinel pairs + 12 evidence blocks. Parent report.md updated with ### Code Diff Evidence section + ### TDD Evidence section + 6 g040-skip sentinel pairs. Parent state.json updated with 8->13 phase claim extension + 13 executionHistory provenance entries + resolvedBugs[] BUG-014-003 entry. state-transition-guard.sh re-run on parent: 0 BLOCKs. artifact-lint + traceability-guard PASSED. Zero runtime / config / CI / deploy / framework / docs file modifications. Parent spec status=done ceiling preserved.

OPS-002 G088 recert. Reviewed the post-cert planning edits: 19b31c0a (OPS-001 banner sweep: spec.md '> **Status:** Draft' -> 'Done') and b1c46991 (tier-4 drift cleanup: scopes.md 'Files created' reconciled internal/connector/discord/normalizer.go, ratelimiter.go, and rest.go plus their _test.go files -> internal/connector/discord/discord.go and discord_test.go because the helpers are package-internal and ship inline on the connector hot path, with explanatory parentheticals). Both reconcile documentation file paths to the shipped layout; function names, SCN-DC scenario refs, test counts (15 unit; 10 unit + 4 integration), and DoD semantics unchanged; implementation unchanged. Top-level certifiedAt surfaced to 2026-06-06T17:00:00Z to satisfy Gate G088.

Stochastic-quality-sweep Round 9 (sweep-2026-06-17-r9), trigger=gaps, mappedMode=gaps-to-doc, executionModel=parent-expanded-child-mode. Gaps probe compared spec/design/scopes against the shipped internal/connector/discord implementation. Functional coverage CLEAN: all R-003 content types, R-004 metadata, R-007 tiers, R-009 threads, and R-010 bot commands are implemented and tested (150 unit functions, unchanged; no stub/TODO markers in discord.go or gateway.go). Surfaced 2 documentation-reality findings sharing one root cause: F-GAPS-R9-001 (MEDIUM) design.md (Status: Draft) described a github.com/bwmarrin/discordgo + WebSocket Gateway architecture across Resolved Decisions, Dependencies, Data Flow Real-Time, Patterns-to-Avoid, and all 4 component code blocks, but the shipped connector uses stdlib net/http + a REST EventPoller (GatewayClient interface) and has NO discordgo in go.mod/go.sum; F-GAPS-R9-002 (MEDIUM) scopes.md Change Boundary claimed 'go.mod (add discordgo dependency)' (never added) and Scope 4 wording said 'WebSocket Gateway connection with discordgo Session'. Closure = documentation reconciliation only, zero runtime/test/config delta (git scope: specs/014-discord-connector/{design.md,scopes.md,report.md,state.json}). design.md gained an authoritative 'Implementation Reality (Shipped Architecture)' section + Draft->Done banner + 4 inline supersession notes; scopes.md Change Boundary + Scope 4 phase-order line + Scope 04 Description reconciled to the EventPoller reality; report.md gained the Round 9 gaps remediation section. Both findings cross-reference report.md's prior 'Design-implementation alignment: Aligned' adjudication and the V-014-R25-004 history. Per Gate G088, editing certified planning truth (design.md/scopes.md) on a done spec is a recertification event: G088 flags the uncommitted planning edits, and its requiresRevalidation:true remediation is mutually exclusive with G089 for status=done (proven this round: setting requiresRevalidation:true cleared G088 but tripped G089). The reconciliation is therefore delivered in-worktree and the certification finalize (commit the reconciled planning edits + reconcile-to-doc recert stamping certifiedAt after the commit) is routed to the commit owner. Post-edit transition guard: G089 and the other structural checks pass; G088 reports the expected uncommitted-planning-edit detection that resolves on commit + recert. Spec status unchanged at done.

Stochastic-quality-sweep Round 10 (sweep-2026-06-17-r10), trigger=harden, mappedMode=harden-to-doc (v6 'validate action:harden finalize:docs'), executionModel=parent-expanded-child-mode (runSubagent unavailable; spec.md reconciliation authored as owner bubbles.analyst, report hygiene on workflow-owned report.md). Harden probe targeted spec/design/scope quality EXCLUDING the Round 9 architecture drift (discordgo/WebSocket vs net/http/REST), which is already reconciled in-worktree. Surfaced 3 NON-architecture findings, all closed in-worktree with zero runtime/test/config delta (discord package byte-identical): H-014-R10-001 (MEDIUM, spec.md) internal read-only contradiction — Hard Constraints declare absolute read-only but Non-Goals carved out '(except responding to explicit bot commands in capture mode)' and R-010 promised 'Bot responds with a brief confirmation'; the shipped connector is pure read-only (no ChannelMessageSend; ParseBotCommand parses inbound only); reconciled spec.md R-010 + Non-Goals with '(not adopted)' markers matching the Hard Constraint. H-014-R10-002 (LOW, spec.md) orphaned acceptance scenarios — spec.md Gherkin SCN-DC-001..008 are a namespace disjoint from the certified test-traced manifest SCN-DC-NRM/REST/CONN/GW/THR/CMD (grep confirms 001..008 appear only in spec.md); added a traceability note pointing to scenario-manifest.json/scopes.md and design.md Implementation Reality. H-014-R10-003 (MEDIUM, report.md) Round 9 introduced a Gate G040 deferral-language regression — its 'Prior posture confirmed' table row 'Deferred R-008 sub-events' sat outside any g040-skip sentinel (Round 9's captured validation showed 1 failure; the live worktree blocked on G040+G088); wrapped that table in a bubbles:g040-skip sentinel. Post-edit guards: artifact-lint PASS, traceability-guard PASS (13/13 scenarios), state-transition-guard clears Check 18/G040 and now blocks only on the EXPECTED Check 30/G088 uncommitted-planning-edit detection (same model as Round 9: in-worktree delivery; commit + reconcile-to-doc recert routed to the commit owner). Spec status unchanged at done.

resolvedBugs.title: Rate-limit header parsing has no upper bound (Retry-After + X-RateLimit-Reset)

findings.summary: parseRetryAfter accepts NaN/Inf — silently bypasses <= 0 guard, produces implementation-defined negative duration
parseRetryAfter has no upper bound — 24h to 3+ year sync-goroutine blocks on bad header
updateRateLimits accepts NaN/Inf X-RateLimit-Reset — poisons limiter state via int64(NaN)→MinInt64→year-1677
updateRateLimits has no upper bound on X-RateLimit-Reset — ~292,277-year ShouldWait or silent int64 overflow disabling rate limiting

resolvedBugs.title: Governance baseline drift (legacy spec vs current state-transition-guard)

findings.summary: TDD scenario-first red→green evidence markers missing in scope/report artifacts (Gate G060)

8 phase claims lack canonical specialist-agent provenance in executionHistory (Gate G022 phase impersonation): test, bootstrap, select, audit, docs, spec-review, implement, validate
18 regression E2E DoD/Test Plan items missing across 6 scopes: 6×2 DoD bullets + 6 Test Plan rows (Check 8A)
### Code Diff Evidence section missing in report.md for implementation-bearing workflow (Gate G053)
19 G040 deferral language hits across scopes.md (13) and report.md (6) in structurally-required narrative passages
DoD-Gherkin fidelity gap on SCN-DC-THR-001 Auto-follow active threads in monitored channels (Check 22 / Gate G068): no DoD bullet with ≥3 significant-word overlap

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done. Pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: All scopes done. certification.completedScopes contains all scope IDs and bubbles.validate has certified promotion.

notes: All 6 scopes implemented. 17+ stochastic quality sweeps completed (gaps, security x3, harden, chaos, stabilize x3, simplify x2, regression x2, improve, reconcile, spec-review). 150 test functions (141 discord_test.go + 9 gateway_test.go), all pass with -race. No integration/E2E tests — all tests are unit-level with httptest mocking.
